text:
On 14-02-11 04:00 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of multimedia/imagination,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/186644 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/186644
> 

I agree, this patch should be applied to the port.

Jesse
